description:
**Milestone:** Health Dashboard and Failure Alerting

Add useSchedulerStatus hook at apps/ui/src/hooks/use-scheduler-status.ts that polls GET /api/automations/scheduler/status every 30 seconds using the existing API client pattern. Add SchedulerHealthGrid component at apps/ui/src/components/views/settings-view/automations/scheduler-health-grid.tsx rendering a grid of task cards: task name, enabled badge, next-run countdown (e.g. 'in 4m 23s'), last-run result badge (green check or red X with error tooltip), execution count. Integrate SchedulerHealthGrid into automations-section.tsx above the automations list in a collapsible 'System Tasks' section. Follow Tailwind CSS 4 and existing component patterns — no new npm dependencies.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/ui/src/hooks/use-scheduler-status.ts
- apps/ui/src/components/views/settings-view/automations/scheduler-health-grid.tsx
- apps/ui/src/components/views/settings-view/automations/automations-section.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] useSchedulerStatus hook fetches and auto-refreshes every 30s
- [ ] SchedulerHealthGrid renders with live data from the API
- [ ] Next-run countdown updates reactively and shows relative time
- [ ] Last-run badge shows green check on success, red X on failure with error tooltip
- [ ] Never-run tasks show N/A for last-run
- [ ] No new npm dependencies introduced
- [ ] TypeScript compiles clean

**Complexity:** medium

**Guardrails:** If this phase involves new or changed behavior, include tests that verify correctness. If this phase adds, removes, or changes a user-facing feature, API endpoint, configuration option, or service, update the relevant documentation in `docs/` to reflect those changes.
title: Scheduler Health Grid Component
